prompt: 帮我写一段 15 秒的视频提示词：一只橘猫从沙发上醒来，伸懒腰，然后跳到窗台上看窗外的雨。竖屏 9:16，治愈风格。
assertions: Uses timestamp storyboard format (0-Xs segments covering full 15s)
Includes camera movement descriptions (e.g., Dolly, Tracking, Push In)
Includes atmosphere/mood descriptions matching healing style
Does not reference any @图片 or @视频 (pure text prompt)
